title: Fodro

{{Quote|The Promenade is one of the shorter races, consisting of only four legs: Dahvil to Ord Dorlass; Ord Dorlass to Tintel; Tintel to Azna; and Azna to Fodro.|Siro Simito, report on the Dahvil-Fodro Hyperspace Promenade|<ref name="CRO">''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]''</ref>}}
'''Fodro''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Clacis sector/Legends|Clacis sector]], on the [[Braxant Run/Legends|Braxant Run]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], it served as the endpoint of the [[Dahvil-Fodro Hyperspace Promenade]], a popular [[Star/Legends|interstellar]] racing route. The [[Racer/Legends|racer]] [[Siro Simito]] once participated in the race, during which he estimated that his rival, [[Seeg]], would arrive at Fodro several [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] earlier than himself. Fodro later fell within the borders of the [[Pentastar Alignment]].

==Description==
Fodro was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|284|Fodro}}</ref> located in the [[Fodro system/Legends|Fodro system]], a part of the [[Clacis sector/Legends|Clacis sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was situated between the [[Gwori system/Legends|Gwori]] and [[Kwevron system/Legends|Kwevron systems]] on the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] known as the [[Braxant Run/Legends|Braxant Run]]<ref name="TEA" /> and lay at a distance of at least two [[Standard day/Legends|days']] [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] travel with a Class 1 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] from<ref name="CRO" /> the [[Demetras sector/Legends|Demetras sector]]<ref name="EAOC Azna">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Azna system/Legends|Azna system]]</ref> planet [[Azna]].<ref name="CRO" />

==History==
{{Quote|Seeg should beat me by a couple of hours, and that really annoys me ''[…]''|Siro Simito, report on the Dahvil-Fodro Hyperspace Promenade|<ref name="CRO" />}}
[[File:Siro_Simito.jpg|thumb|right|180px|As part of the Dahvil-Fodro Hyperspace Promenade race, the pilot Siro Simito traveled from the planet Azna to Fodro.]]
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Fodro served as the endpoint of the popular<ref name="CRO" /> [[Standard year/Legends|annual]]<ref name="CSWE" /> [[Star Rally]] [[Star/Legends|interstellar]] racing route known as the [[Dahvil-Fodro Hyperspace Promenade]], with the segment connecting Azna and Fodro constituting the final leg of the route. The [[Racer/Legends|racer]] and undercover [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] operative [[Siro Simito]] once participated in the Dahvil-Fodro Hyperspace Promenade.<ref name="CRO" />

On the eighteenth day of the race, while in hyperspace transit from Azna to Fodro, Simito estimated in a report he was making on the race that his rival, [[Seeg]], would beat him to the finish line at Fodro by several [[Standard hour/Legends|hours']] [[Time/Legends|time]]. Despite the competitiveness Simito felt toward Seeg, the former intentionally decreased the hyperdrive efficiency of his [[Axe (starship)|starship]] during the flight to Fodro so that he could subsequently publicly claim that the [[GAT-12 Skipray Blastboat|ship]] had [[Engine/Legends|engine]] problems—which would deflect attention from the detours the [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] planned to make during the next race in order to make several secret deliveries for the Rebel Alliance.<ref name="CRO" />

At some point by the time the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] was fought, Rebel Alliance [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] included Simito's report, which also described the Dahvil-Fodro Hyperspace Promenade and its route, in a [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] detailing various Rebel operatives.<ref name="CRO" /> Between [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] and [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], Fodro fell within the territory controlled by the [[Pentastar Alignment]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Fodro was created by [[Chuck Truett]] and was introduced in ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', a [[1994]] [[West End Games]] sourcebook published for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="CRO" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Fodro [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, in grid square K-4.<ref name="TEA" />
